description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular metal head with a visibly weathered and rusted surface, indicating extensive use or exposure to the elements. The head is solid and blocky, with flat striking faces on both ends, suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle is long, straight, and made of wood, showing a natural brown coloration and a smooth, cylindrical shape. The connection between the head and handle is reinforced with a circular wooden wedge, visible on the top of the head, securing the handle in place. The overall appearance suggests this tool is designed for demanding tasks such as breaking concrete, driving stakes, or demolition work in urban or construction environments. There are no visible brand markings, accessories, or ergonomic enhancements on the handle.
description: A weathered sledgehammer with a rusted metal head and a long, straight wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks.
description_view_0: The sledgehammer is shown at an angle, highlighting the rusted metal head and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: A direct view of the striking face, showing the rectangular head and the handle extending directly downward.
description_view_2: The opposite angled view, displaying the other side of the head and the handle, with the weathered texture visible.
description_view_3: A top-down view revealing the circular wooden wedge securing the handle within the head.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, rectangular block shape, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible rust and weathering on the metal head, no major dents or chips
